message:
test(agent): add Cursor/Windsurf/Aider/Ollama coverage (79.8%→97.7%)

Expand agent type tests (DisplayName, String, IsValid) to cover all
types. Add parser detection, state, and pattern tests for Cursor,
Windsurf, Aider via ParseWithHint. Cover default branches in
detect/collect functions via Ollama hint and confidence clamping edge
cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
